steps.title: Identify the focus
steps.content: The text opens by saying Cardinal combines Indigenous and classical music, then gives Orchestral Powwow as an example: powwow-style songs with orchestral arrangements led by a powwow drum instead of a conductor.

steps.title: Reject shifted purposes
steps.content: B adds an argument about recognition for a new style that the text does not make. C invents production difficulties. D shifts to a contrast between training and heritage, but the passage focuses on the music's blended traditions. The purpose is to show how Cardinal's compositions combine cultures. The answer is A.
